Potencialize sua experiência no WhatsApp Web com essa extensão.

Potencialize sua experiência no WhatsApp Web com essa extensão.

- ✅ Ícone de Acesso Rápido: Adiciona um ícone do WhatsApp na barra do navegador para abrir uma interface com um campo de input para digitar ou colar um número de telefone, junto com um botão "Abrir" ou "Falar".
- ✅ Abrir no WhatsApp com Botão Direito: Permite selecionar um texto, clicar com o botão direito e escolher a opção "Abrir no WhatsApp". O número é formatado e o link para o WhatsApp é aberto.
- ✅ Colar da Área de Transferência: Possibilidade de colar automaticamente o conteúdo da área de transferência ao abrir a interface de acesso rápido.
- ✅ Abrir Sidebar no WhatsApp Web: Para usar funções avançadas
- ✅ Templates de Mensagens: Oferece a opção de utilizar templates de mensagens para facilitar o envio de mensagens para contatos.
- ✅ Autenticação com Google Contatos : Agora é possível autenticar-se com a conta do Google para facilitar o processo de salvar contatos e ter acesso rápido aos contatos já adicionados.
- ✅ Opção de Abertura por WhatsApp Web ou Desktop: Agora, a extensão apresenta um menu de configurações. Dentro desse menu, há uma opção chamada "Abrir preferencialmente por", que permite escolher entre "WhatsApp Web" e "WhatsApp Desktop". Essa preferência determina como os links serão gerados, seja no campo de input, ao abrir seus contatos do google ou ao clicar no ícone próximo aos números. Essa configuração é salva localmente para facilitar o uso futuro.
- ✅ Atalho na Barra Lateral : Agora, na barra lateral, você tem um campo para inserir um número e abrir o WhatsApp Web com apenas um clique em "Abrir". Permite iniciar uma conversa com um contato já existente ou um novo chat.
- ✅ Etiquetas para Contatos : Adiciona a funcionalidade de marcar contatos com etiquetas, como "Lead", "Negociando", "Agendado", "Proposta", "Contrato", "Cliente", "Perdido". Essas etiquetas são armazenadas lista de chats. Também é possível filtrar chats por etiqueta na coluna de chats.

Nota: Este é um resumo das funcionalidades já implementadas. O projeto pode estar em constante evolução e receber atualizações adicionais.
Flippy: Inspiration and Focus in Each New Tab
Find both Focus and Limitless Inspiration while browsing! Enjoy each new tab using productivity tools!

💡 Transform your new tab into the ultimate productivity workspace! Flippy combines powerful tools for focus, task management, time tracking, AI assistance, and inspiration—- all in one beautiful, distraction-free environment!

💡 Flippy brings everything together in your new tab—your personal command center for peak productivity. Whether you're managing daily tasks, tracking time with Pomodoro, planning with an integrated calendar, or getting AI-powered assistance, Flippy has you covered.

💡 Experience a workspace designed for modern productivity. With draggable tools, beautiful backgrounds, and seamless integration of all your essential productivity features, Flippy transforms every new tab into an opportunity to stay focused, organized, and inspired.

Flippy isn't just another new tab extension—it's your complete productivity ecosystem that brings together task management, time tracking, AI assistance, content curation, and focus tools in one seamless, beautiful workspace!

🚀 Key Features:

⭐ Save Any Content with Smart Organization
Whether it's a webpage, blog, or video, Flippy's powerful content management system keeps everything organized and accessible—ready whenever inspiration strikes.

⭐ AI Lab - Your Personal AI Assistant
Bring your own API key and chat with the latest AI models including GPT, Claude, and more. Get instant answers, brainstorm ideas, and enhance your productivity—all within your new tab.

⭐ Smart Todo List with Goals
Stay on top of your tasks with an intuitive todo list that helps you organize your day. Set daily goals, track progress, and celebrate completions with satisfying animations. All your tasks sync seamlessly and are always accessible.

⭐ Integrated Calendar
Never miss important dates with the built-in calendar. View your schedule at a glance, plan ahead, and stay organized—all in one place alongside your other productivity tools.

⭐ Focus Mode for Distraction-Free New Tabs
Transform your new tab experience with beautiful, calming backgrounds and curated content that keeps you focused and inspired without distractions.

⭐ Built-in Pomodoro Timer
Stay focused with an integrated Pomodoro timer. Track your work sessions, take strategic breaks, and maintain productivity momentum. The timer displays in your pinned tab favicon, so you're always aware of your session progress.

⭐ Draggable Tools for Personalized Workspace
All tools (Todo List, Calendar, Pomodoro, AI Lab) are fully draggable! Arrange your workspace exactly how you want it for maximum productivity and comfort.

⭐ Step-Tours for Deep Content Exploration
Turn your saved collections into guided journeys! Navigate through your best content one piece at a time, perfect for focused reading sessions and rediscovering forgotten gems.

⭐ Tabs-Tours for Continuous Inspiration
Each new tab serves up a surprise from your curated content—ensuring you constantly rediscover articles, videos, and resources that spark new ideas and keep creativity flowing.

⭐ Timed Sessions for Mindful Browsing
Set focused exploration sessions—whether it's a quick 5-minute inspiration break or a deep-dive learning session, make every moment with your content count.

Ready to transform your new tab into a productivity powerhouse? Install Flippy and experience the perfect blend of focus, organization, and inspiration—all in one beautiful workspace!

Flippy combines the focus of Momentum, the time-management of Pomodoro timers, the task management of Todoist, the AI assistance of ChatGPT, the content organization of Pocket, and calendar planning—all unified in one seamless, productivity-driven experience.

Launch Zingtree interactive decision trees from Chrome

Launch Zingtree interactive decision trees from Chrome

The Zingtree Interactive Decision Tree extension for Chrome makes it easy to launch a decision tree from any CRM or Help Desk system. This is extremely useful for internal live support agents in contact centers or similar.

Not only can you give your agents a set of decision tree scripts to follow, but each instance of the script is tied to the active page. So if you have a support ticket or case open, then launch the decision tree, and then come back to that same case or ticket, relaunching the decision tree will resume at the same place previously, and also show the history of what transpired. We call this "Pause and Resume".

You'll need to create your own decision tree scripts to use this extension. Sign up for a free trial at https://zingtree.com

Google Business Profile ID Finder – GBPPromote
Google tool to quickly find and copy any Google Business Profile ID by GBPPromote.

✅Google Business Profile ID Finder, Quickly Find the GMB ID You Need in Just One Click
1. If you manage or work with Google Business Profiles (formerly Google My Business or GMB), there’s one piece of information you often need but can’t easily find — the Profile ID (also known as Place ID or CID).
2. This Chrome extension makes it effortless.
3. With just one click, you can instantly extract the unique ID of any Google Business Profile directly from Google Search or Maps. No coding, no manual digging, no guessing.

✅ What Does It Do?
1. The Google Business Profile ID Finder:
2. Instantly shows you the Profile ID of any business profile on Google
3. Works directly on Google Search and Google Maps
4. Lets you copy the ID with one click for use in support forms.

✅How to Use the Google Business Profile ID Finder?
1. Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store
2. Click the extension icon in your Chrome toolbar
3. A panel will open — click “Profile ID Finder”
4. On the left, you'll see your Google Business Profile ID (Place ID and/or CID)
5. Click “Copy Profile ID” to save and use it for support, tracking, or API integrations


✅ Why Should You Install It?
⚡ Save Time – Skip complex methods of finding GMB Profile IDs manually
🔁 Reinstatement Requests – Google support often asks for the profile’s Place ID. This tool gives it to you instantly
🧰 Lightweight & Easy – No setup needed. Works instantly after install


🔒 Safe & Secure
This extension runs entirely in your browser. No data is sent or stored. Your searches and IDs stay private and secure.

Auto-detects Google Flights and converts to Sabre strings with multi-page merge support.

Sabre Flight Translator (Above9 Internal) is a proprietary productivity tool designed exclusively for travel professionals at Above9 Travel.

Instead of manually typing out flight segments, dates, times, and aircraft equipment codes, this extension seamlessly integrates a translation button directly into the Google Flights interface.

Key Features:

Exclusive Access: Securely locked to authorized @above9.travel email accounts.

One-Click Translation: Automatically reads expanded Google Flight details on your screen.

Accurate Sabre Formatting: Converts departure/arrival times, date crossings, equipment codes, and flight numbers into clean Sabre Sell (0) and VI (vi*) lines.

Auto-Copy: Instantly copies the generated Sabre string to your clipboard for immediate pasting into your GDS terminal.

Note: You must be logged into your Chrome browser with a valid @above9.travel email address for this extension to activate.

Stop rewriting your story. TwinFiller is the AI assistant that tailors your job applications keeping your authentic voice.

🤖 TwinFiller: The Application Companion That Learns Your Voice
Stop rewriting the same answers. Start applying faster. 🚀

I’ve been there. Applying to hundreds of jobs, dealing with the burnout, and—worst of all—the sheer waste of time answering the same questions over and over.

"Why us?""Describe a challenge you overcame.""Tell us about a project with technology X."

Keeping a Google Doc of answers is exhausting because every company asks slightly differently. Existing tools just paste your resume info or generate generic, robotic fluff.

TwinFiller is different. It’s a "clipboard on steroids" that eliminates the repetitive drudgery of application portals, allowing you to focus on what matters: telling your story.

🧠 The Game-Changer: AI That Learns from YOU
Unlike generic autofill tools, TwinFiller specializes in the complex, open-ended questions found in high-stakes applications. It doesn't write fake generic crap; it recycles your actual answers so you don't have to type them out again.

First Application: The AI generates a draft based on your resume. You refine it to match your professional tone. ✍️

Next Application: When a new company asks a similar behavioral question, TwinFiller parses the page, understands the job details, and instantly suggests your previously perfected answer, adapted to the new context. 🔄

Continuous Growth: Your responses become more personalized and polished with every submission. The AI suggests, you approve.

🌟 Beyond Your Resume
Your CV lists facts, but applications require narrative. TwinFiller captures and reuses the qualitative parts of your professional profile that don't fit on a one-page PDF:

📝 Tailored cover letter paragraphs

🏢 Responses to "Why do you want to work here?"

🗣️ Descriptions of soft skills and leadership style

🔄 Explanations of gaps or career changes

After just a few uses, TwinFiller becomes a repository of your best professional anecdotes, ready to be deployed instantly.

⚡ Key Features
Real-Time Adaptation: The AI adapts your stored answers to fit specific questions from different recruiters.

One-Click Completion: Use the shortcut Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+F to populate entire application pages instantly. ⌨️

Context-Awareness: Distinguishes between a "Cover Letter" field and an "Additional Comments" field by parsing the page HTML. 🕵️‍♂️

Universal Support: Works seamlessly on major Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS).

Resume Parsing: Upload your PDF CV to instantly populate your base profile. 📄

🛡️ Privacy & Quality First
Quality Over Quantity: We are not a "spam" bot. We believe high-quality applications win interviews. You explicitly review and approve every field before submission.

Privacy: Your career history is private.

🔒 Local Storage: Your personal data and learned responses remain stored locally on your browser.

🚫 No Tracking: We do not track your application history or collect analytics on where you apply.

🎯 Perfect For
Job Seekers: Apply to more roles in less time without ever sounding generic. 💼

University Applicants: Streamline college admissions and complex scholarship questionnaires. 🎓

Grant Seekers: Reuse successful language across different funding applications. 💰

🛠️ How It Works
Install the TwinFiller extension.

Upload your CV to initialize your profile.

Visit any job board or application portal.

Press Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+F (or click the icon).

Watch as the AI intelligently drafts your responses.

Review, tweak, and save your best answers for the future.

💸 Free to Start
It’s free right now! Get started immediately to experience the core features. (At least until the infrastructure costs get too high! 😄)

Support & Feedback I built this to stop the madness of job hunting. If you find a bug or a specific ATS site where it struggles, let me know! Contact us via email or GitHub.

This solution helps capture and report activity data in ProHance Work Time analytics.

ReCo is the workspace where the role, CV, notes, live transcript, and questions stay together —…

Reports done 50–80% faster.

ReCo is the workspace where the role, CV, notes, live transcript, and questions stay together — before, during, and after the call. So you stay present in the conversation and finish documentation in half the time.

ReCo starts where the ATS stops — and naturally leads you from the conversation until the final candidate recommendation.

→ No switching tools.
→ No manual note-taking.
→ No losing hours on recommendations & summaries.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WHAT'S INSIDE RECO

▸ Live Transcript — every word captured automatically, in real time. No bot, no recording notification.

▸ One Workspace — role, CV, notes, and transcript side-by-side. The full context of the call in a single view.

▸ AI Across Your Workflow — AI is available everywhere in ReCo, not bolted onto a single screen. Build your questions list, prepare for the call, evaluate nuances, generate the candidate report — AI sits inside each step. The context grows naturally as you work, so you never rebuild it from scratch or re-explain the candidate and role to a new chat.

▸ Custom Reports — generated directly from the conversation, structured around your own criteria and exported onto your boutique's branded paper. 50–80% faster than starting from a blank page.

▸ CV Blinding — candidate names and personal details are removed before any AI processing. Locally, in your browser.

▸ Transcript Edits — fix misspellings, role names, or remove sensitive content directly in the transcript.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔒 PRIVATE AND COMPLIANT

ReCo helps recruiters get and stay compliant when handling candidate data under GDPR and similar privacy regulations.

✓ Transcripts, CVs, and reports stored on your device — not uploaded to any server.
✓ Recruiter Companion Labs PSA does not have access to your files.
✓ CV Blinding runs automatically and locally — no candidate data leaves your browser unprocessed.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🚫 NO BOT JOINS THE CALL

ReCo runs silently in the background — nothing visible to candidates or clients. No recording notification. No third party in the meeting.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🌍 WORKS IN 30+ LANGUAGES

English, German, Polish, Danish, Swedish, French, Spanish, and more. Speak naturally — ReCo simply gets you.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

DESIGNED FOR

→ Boutique recruitment agencies and direct-hire consultants
→ Executive Search and headhunters
→ Solo recruiters and freelancers

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WHY RECRUITERS CHOOSE RECO

✓ Reports done 50–80% faster — without rewriting notes after each call.
✓ No more copy-pasting — candidate recommendations get exported on your branded paper.
✓ You stay focused on the conversation — ReCo organizes everything for you.
✓ One workspace — instead of juggling tabs, docs, and separate AI tools.
✓ Works from your first call — no manual prompting, no bots, no setup ritual.
✓ Your data stays yours — local storage, CV blinding, transcript edits, full control.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

ReCo is a Chrome extension. It works with browser-based Google Meet and Microsoft Teams calls (not the desktop apps).

Add ReCo and finish your next interview report 50% faster.

Nitefall is a browser extension that converts all your websites to dark mode and reduces eye strain, especially helpful at night. It works automatically with system appearance so that your websites are only dark when the whole system is in dark mode.

Features:
-3 dark themes to pick from (Dark gray, Monokai, Midnight)
-Darken navigation maps
-Darken PDF documents
-Support for blacklisting specific websites
-Increase transparent PNG icons contrast (especially when they are very dark and not easily to viewable)
-Per site configurable image brightness (useful if the website is displaying bright images)


Nitefall supports the following keyboard shortcuts:
Alt+Shift+N: Toggle extension
Alt+Shift+P: Toggle dark mode for current page

You can try the extension for free on up to 15 websites in trial mode. To use it on an unlimited number of webpages, you need to upgrade to a premium plan.

Fact-check any selected text with one click using Factually's AI-powered verification system.

Factually is a tool to help you combat misinformation online. The goal is not to tell you what to think, who to trust or to paint the world in black and white. Rather, we want to facilitate your research, explore a variety of sources and help you draw your own high-quality conclusions.

Powered by LLM's
We use LLMs (AI like ChatGPT) to extract the claims from your prompt. We then perform a web search to identify relevant, reliable sources, analyze them, and generate a summary of the results while citing the sources behind each piece of information. You can and should verify any information yourself using the source links. For more information, refer to the FAQ Page.

Giving you the full context
As expected, the vast majority of people use Factually to fact-check political/social/economic claims, which rarely have a straightforward answer. In order to present a more complete and balanced view of the topics at hand, Factually intentionally tries to source information from both established media (AP, Reuters, BBC, etc.) as well as more niche outlets.
